title: Fairground Anchors: Minimum-Discrepancy Carnival Ride Circuit
strategies: diagonal ride-line baseline: place all anchors along the main diagonal ((i+0.5)/M repeated) -- valid but badly clustered (scores ~0.1)
additive-recurrence (Kronecker) lattice: x_i^k = frac((i+1)*sqrt(prime_k)), a cheap low-discrepancy spread
Hammersley/Halton construction: fixed first coordinate i/M plus radical-inverse coordinates in distinct prime bases
local-search / optimization over anchor positions minimizing the exactly-computed star discrepancy (open-ended: no known optimal set)
